subject: The cold email you didn't archive
label: Inbox

body.text: I understand most of your team's cold outbound goes unanswered. Not because the writing is poor, but because the senior buyers you need are the most emailed people alive, and one more message in the pile was never going to move them.

So we did the opposite of sending another email. We researched this one, printed it at A2, and had it couriered to your desk. You are reading it because it is the only piece of outreach on your desk, rather than the fortieth in a folder.

That is what we do: one researched, physical artefact, built for one person at a time, that makes the recipient feel genuinely understood in the first two seconds and earns the meeting your sequence could not.
We are taking on a small number of founding clients now, one company at a time.
If you would like to see the piece we would build for your ten most wanted accounts, just let me know.

postscript: Yes, I printed an email at A2 and had it delivered to your desk.
